rules.name: shallow_render_only
rules.description: Test renders component with no meaningful props, no user interaction, and only checks DOM existence (toBeInTheDocument, toBeVisible, toBeTruthy, toMatchSnapshot). Provides zero behavioral coverage.

pattern_indicators.description: Only assertion is DOM existence or snapshot — no behavioral check.

pattern_indicators.pattern: zero userEvent|fireEvent|rerender|waitFor calls in test block
pattern_indicators.description: No user interaction triggers at all.

rules.remediation: Add meaningful props, user interaction (fireEvent/userEvent), and behavioral assertions (state change, callback invocation, rendered content validation).

rules.name: tautological_assertion
rules.description: Assertion that is always true regardless of component behavior. Includes literal-to-literal comparisons and toBeDefined() on non-nullable expressions.

pattern_indicators.description: Literal compared to itself — always passes.
toBeDefined alone is weak — most expressions are defined.

rules.remediation: Replace with assertions that test actual component behavior: output values, side effects, state transitions, or error conditions.

rules.name: template_duplication
rules.description: Structurally identical test body copied across multiple files. Detected via normalized body hash (comment strip, whitespace normalize, test title remove, import normalize).

pattern_indicators.pattern: normalized body SHA-256 match across 2+ files
pattern_indicators.description: Same test logic duplicated with only cosmetic differences.

rules.remediation: Extract shared test utilities; write unique test scenarios per component that exercise distinct behaviors.

positive_match: 223 depth test files with identical 88-line render(<div data-testid>) body
negative_match: Two tests sharing a helper function but with different assertions and scenarios

rules.name: no_real_import
rules.description: Test file does not import the component it claims to test. File name implies ComponentX but no import of ComponentX found. Detected via AST-lite heuristic comparing filename to import list.

pattern_indicators.pattern: filename contains ComponentName but import list does not include ComponentName
pattern_indicators.description: Test file never imports the subject under test.

rules.remediation: Import and test the actual component. If the file tests utilities, rename it to reflect the real subject.

positive_match: Button.test.tsx with no 'import { Button }' or 'import Button' statement

rules.name: mock_everything_test_nothing
rules.description: All dependencies mocked, no real function call or integration point tested. Detected via mock/spy count vs real assertion ratio. mock_ratio > 0.8 and real_call_count == 0 triggers warning.

pattern_indicators.pattern: vi.mock|jest.mock count > 3 AND real assertion count == 0
pattern_indicators.description: Heavy mocking surface with no real integration test.

rules.remediation: Reduce mocking surface; test at integration boundaries. Mock external APIs and router, not internal component logic. Every mock-heavy test must have at least one contract or side-effect assertion.

rules.name: bulk_generation_marker
rules.description: Tests generated with known bulk-generation markers indicating automated mass creation without quality review.

pattern_indicators.description: Known markers from bulk test generation tools.

rules.remediation: Delete the marker and replace with genuine hand-written tests that exercise real component behavior.

negative_match: // Tests for edge cases in date formatting
